CustomField.description: PO 的订单类别是E SO 的订单类型是S VO 的订单类型是V
CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK(Order_Classification__c), "None", IF(CONTAINS("E", Order_Classification__c), "EDI Order", IF(CONTAINS("V", Order_Classification__c), "Virtual Order", IF(CONTAINS("S", Order_Classification__c), "Sales Order","Other"))))
CustomField.label: OrderClassificationEN
